title: pkcs11: ECDSA algorithm detection hardcodes P-256 without curve inspection
description: secretx-pkcs11/src/lib.rs detect_algorithm() returns EcdsaP256Sha256 for any ECDSA key without reading the EC_PARAMS attribute to determine the actual curve. Trigger: PKCS#11 token with a P-384 or secp256k1 key → algorithm() returns EcdsaP256Sha256 → signature verification fails (or succeeds spuriously with wrong curve). Will silently produce wrong results for any non-P256 ECDSA key.
